briefing:
## 🌍 Top 5 Global Fintech News

- **[Fintech founder charged with fraud; AI app found to be humans in the Philippines](https://techcrunch.com/2025/04/10/fintech-founder-charged-with-fraud-after-ai-shopping-app-found-to-be-powered-by-humans-in-the-philippines/)** — *Hacker News* — A fintech founder faces fraud charges after their supposedly AI-powered shopping app was discovered to actually be operated by human workers in the Philippines.

- **[Americans see their savings vanish in Synapse fintech crisis](https://www.cnbc.com/2024/11/22/synapse-bankruptcy-thousands-of-americans-see-their-savings-vanish.html)** — *Hacker News* — Thousands of Americans lost access to their savings following the collapse of Banking-as-a-Service middleware provider Synapse, raising serious questions about consumer protections in embedded finance arrangements.

- **[Apple acquires UK open banking startup Credit Kudos](https://ffnews.com/newsarticle/apple-acquires-uk-open-banking-startup-credit-kudos/)** — *Hacker News* — Apple acquired UK-based open banking and credit scoring startup Credit Kudos, signalling the tech giant's deepening ambitions in financial data and lending.

- **[Open Banking and Payments Competition](https://www.bitsaboutmoney.com/archive/open-banking-and-payments-competition/)** — *Hacker News* — A detailed analysis explores how open banking frameworks are reshaping competitive dynamics in payments markets globally.

- **[Fintech is making credit cards weirder](https://workweek.com/2022/08/05/fintech-is-making-credit-cards-weirder/)** — *Hacker News* — Fintech innovation is driving increasingly unconventional credit card products, blurring the lines between traditional lending and modern consumer finance.

---

## 🍁 Top 5 Canadian Fintech News

- **[Canada calls screen scraping 'unsecure,' sets Open Banking target for 2023](https://finledger.com/2021/08/09/canada-sets-open-banking-target-for-2023/)** — *Hacker News* — Canada's government flagged screen scraping as a security risk and committed to an open banking framework, a regulatory journey still unfolding with implications for Canadian fintechs and credit unions today.

- **[Canada committed to real-time rail, aims to be a point of stability in an uncertain world, finance minister says](https://betakit.com/canada-committed-to-real-time-rail-aims-to-be-a-point-of-stability-in-an-uncertain-world-finance-minister-says/)** — *BetaKit* — Canada's finance minister reaffirmed the country's commitment to its Real-Time Rail payments modernization initiative, positioning Canada as a stable player amid global economic uncertainty.

- **[It's a tough market for liquidity. Here's where companies and investors are turning](https://betakit.com/its-a-tough-market-for-liquidity-heres-where-companies-and-investors-are-turning/)** — *BetaKit* — With traditional exit paths tightening, Canadian companies and venture investors are exploring alternative liquidity strategies in a challenging capital markets environment.

- **[Canada's economy dropped 18,000 jobs in April as unemployment rose to 6-month high](https://www.cbc.ca/news/business/canada-jobs-april-2026-9.7192292?cmp=rss)** — *CBC Business* — Canada shed 18,000 jobs in April, pushing unemployment to its highest level in six months and adding pressure on household finances and consumer lending across the country.

- **[Why you don't need a PhD to invest in deep tech](https://betakit.com/why-you-dont-need-a-phd-to-invest-in-deep-tech/)** — *BetaKit* — Canadian investors are being encouraged to demystify deep tech investment, a perspective relevant to fintech VCs eyeing emerging technology opportunities in Atlantic Canada and beyond.

---

## 🌊 Bonus: Relevant to Atlantic Fintech's Focus (1–3 articles)

- **[Fintech dystopia](https://fintechdystopia.com/)** — *Hacker News* — A critical look at the darker consequences of rapid fintech expansion, touching on financial exclusion and consumer harm — themes directly relevant to Atlantic Fintech's focus on responsible financial inclusion in underserved communities.

- **[Bobbie Racette built her new startup around a simple idea: be the support she never had](https://betakit.com/bobbie-racette-built-her-new-startup-around-a-simple-idea-be-the-support-she-never-had/)** — *BetaKit* — Indigenous Canadian entrepreneur Bobbie Racette's founder story highlights the kind of values-driven, community-focused startup building that Atlantic Canada's emerging tech ecosystem can draw inspiration from.
